items.title: Upgrade Node Types for Better Compatibility in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @types/node package from version 25.9.3 to 26.0.1, ensuring improved type definitions for Node.js. The changes in package-lock.json and package.json reflect this upgrade, which may enhance compatibility with newer Node.js features and libraries.

items.title: Fix timestamp serialization for async image requests in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a critical issue where asynchronous image requests could not retrieve results due to BSON Date serialization errors. The timestamps for tasks are now stored as epoch floats instead of BSON Dates, ensuring compatibility with the worker's JSON serialization. Regression tests have been added to confirm that all timestamps serialize correctly as numeric values.

items.title: Increase upload limit for image generation in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update raises the Nginx client_max_body_size from 20MB to 30MB to accommodate larger image uploads for the studio image-generation feature. Previously, uploads between 20-28MB were rejected with a generic error, preventing users from successfully uploading images. Now, users will receive a clearer JSON error message for uploads exceeding the backend limit of 28MB.

items.title: Enhance upstream error logging in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the logging of upstream error responses by capturing the full response body along with the traceId. Previously, only a truncated message was logged, which made it difficult to trace errors back to the upstream request_id. Now, developers can easily recover detailed error information from the logs, enhancing debugging capabilities.

items.title: Retire Generic Failover Deployment in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the generic `/test/failover` deployment, which was solely used for testing and had no production traffic. Key changes include the deletion of related configuration files and updates to the README to reflect the new state. The task-aware image routes remain active for production use, while the test route is preserved in the binary for local verification.

items.title: Documentation Update for Failover Router in Index 🚀
items.summary: This PR updates the documentation for the failover-router to reflect that versions 1 and 2 have been successfully deployed in Hong Kong. Key changes include marking the status as shipped, reconciling discrepancies between the v1 and v2 design documents, and clarifying the failover status rules. These updates ensure that the documentation aligns with the current operational reality and provides clear guidance for future use.

items.title: Update uuid to version 14.0.1 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the uuid package from version 14.0.0 to 14.0.1, addressing a bug related to the types condition for node exports. The changes are reflected in both package.json and package-lock.json files, ensuring compatibility and improved functionality. This minor version update enhances the overall stability of the project.

items.title: Enhance Resilience with Agent Retries and Fish TTS Chunking in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the resilience of the agent by implementing error classification and exponential backoff for retries, ensuring that transient failures do not lead to hard failures. Additionally, Fish TTS now handles long texts by chunking them into manageable segments, enhancing audio processing efficiency. These changes aim to reduce job failures and improve overall system reliability.

items.title: Enhance chat command with new options in Clis 🚀
items.summary: The grok CLI's chat command has been updated to include six new parameters, aligning it with the OpenAPI specification. Key additions include options for service tiers, log probabilities, and token limits, enhancing the command's functionality. The README has been updated to reflect these changes, and new tests have been implemented to ensure proper functionality.

items.title: Updated Example URLs for Grok Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces outdated example URLs in the Grok documentation and OpenAPI specifications with verified assets. The changes affect 37 files across multiple languages, ensuring users can access valid resources without encountering 404 errors. A follow-up CI check will be implemented to prevent similar issues in the future.

items.title: Streamline Announcement Management in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new skill and helper script for managing in-product announcements on the AceData Cloud platform. The script allows users to list, create, translate, publish, and delete announcements via the admin API, enhancing the efficiency of the announcement process. Additionally, it includes a confirm-before-publish workflow to ensure careful management of outward-facing content.
